response.justification: Bogdan is a strong hands-on senior engineer with roughly 18 years of broad experience spanning web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput systems, and he technically meets the 15-year minimum with a bachelor's in computer science. However, this is a director-level individual-contributor role centered on AI strategy, and his profile does not show recognized AI expertise, shipped AI products or platforms, or advisory work with strategic customers. His AI exposure (MCP code generators and agent tooling since 2025) is recent and narrow, his career trajectory has plateaued at senior/staff IC level, and there is no evidence of the organizational influence or cloud-platform strategy depth the role demands.
strengths: 18+ years of broad, polyglot engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and low-latency distributed systems
Entrepreneurial track record as founder of an open-source geo-data platform, plus conference talks and workshop teaching
Recent hands-on work on AI-agent infrastructure, MCP code generators, and agentic workflow tooling
concerns: No recognized AI expertise, AI-related advanced degree, or demonstrated AI products/platforms at meaningful scale
Career history is senior/staff IC delivery work with no evidence of director-level strategic, advisory, or cross-org leadership scope
Cloud experience is application-level (AWS CDK, Kubernetes deploys) rather than cloud platform strategy or product direction

key_factors.factor: Seniority gap vs. director-level strategy role
Long broad engineering experience with entrepreneurial and community activity
